summary: Excellent soundboard recording of a solid show with a standout "Musta Been the Doses" and great Dylan covers
review: The reviewer rates this release five stars, praising both the Beyer tape (sound‑board) and front‑of‑house mixes as very nice. The concert is described as solid – not legendary but enjoyable – with particular love for the "Musta Been the Doses" performance and a couple of strong Dylan numbers.

ai_rating.rationale: One enthusiastic five‑star review indicates an excellent recording and a good (solid) show; weighted rating yields about 4.3 stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer praises the Beyer tape and front‑of‑house mix, noting clear and balanced sound.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Consistent energy throughout; solid performance with enjoyable Dylan covers.
